expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers (1) distinct dashboard-level entry paths: "Start Google Sheets export from dashboard-level export entry points (toolbar / menu)" and "...context menu entry points (right-click)"; (2) option combinations: "Export with default options...", "Toggle each available option...", and "Validate incompatible/disabled option combinations..."; and (3) visible completion outcomes: sections for "Success outcome...", "Failure outcome...", and "Cancellation results in a visible canceled state...".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states "Execution summary (phase4a / advisory)" and "Produced a Phase 4a subcategory-only scenario draft"; result.md header is "Phase 4a — Scenario Draft (Subcategory-only)" and the content is a scenario draft with subcategory bullets and P1/P2 priorities, matching Phase 4a scenario drafting output.
